author: @yonight6871
text: The hotel only costs 35 US dollars a night, which is very cheap. It's not a star hotel, so it's cheap. The tricycle you take is not expensive. The price given by the hotel is only a reference price, which is the price for locals. If you are a foreigner, it may be more expensive. But once the price is negotiated, it will not be changed. What happens in India is that halfway through the ride, the driver will increase the price, and if he doesn't agree, he will leave the customer where he is, which makes people very angry. This kind of thing will not happen in China. Prices in China are very cheap and most people can afford it. When in Guilin, you must eat the local Guilin rice noodles. It is very delicious, cheap and authentic.

author: @howardcheung5809
text: the food at the beginning could be a mooncake...mid autumn festive food. The mid-autumn Festival is next Tuesday and there will be lots of lanterns and people will be out to see the full moon. Every year mid-autumn festival is the 15th August in the lunar calendar.
